general_info.Disclosure: 1. Kindly note that Vanraj Bajaj (Minor), who is a part of promoter group holds total 332,360 (post stock split and bonus issue) shares in the Company, out of which 100,360 shares (post stock split and bonus issue) are encumbered due to following: Vanraj Bajaj has inherited 10,036 equity shares of the Company from the estate of his deceased father, Late Shri Anant Bajaj, who was a member of the Promoter Group of the Company till the time of his death on 10 August 2018. In terms of the Order of Hon'ble Bombay High Court dated 16th January, 2020, read with the modified Order dated 30th January, 2020 in IA No. 1 of 2020 in Petition No. 2972 of 2018, Ms. Pooja Bajaj acting in her capacity as the mother and natural guardian of Vanraj Bajaj, has offered an undertaking that the shares as referred to hereunder, being the 1/3rd share that will come to the share of Vanraj Bajaj from and out of the estate of his deceased father, Mr. Anant Bajaj shall be kept aside and not dealt with during the minority of Vanraj Bajaj, without the prior leave of the Hon'ble Court.10,036 Equity shares of the Company, being the 1/3rd share that will come to Vanraj Bajaj from and out of the shares presently held by the estate of his deceased father, Mr. Anant Bajaj; andPooja Bajaj, in her capacity as the mother and natural guardian of Vanraj Bajaj had given the undertakings as aforesaid with a view to securing Vanraj's 1/3rd share in the estate of his deceased father, Mr. Anant Bajaj.In pursuance of the foregoing, Ms. Pooja Bajaj has on 18 February, 2020 submitted an Affidavit containing the undertakings as aforesaid to the Hon'ble Court. The Hon'ble Court has vide its Order dated 26 February, 2020 accepted the undertakings as aforesaid. In the circumstances, the aforesaid shares of the Company cannot be dealt with or disposed-off until Vanraj Bajaj attains majority or during his minority, without obtaining the prior leave of the Honble Court. Therefore, these shares are not pledged with the depository but are to be treated as 'encumbered otherwise'. 2. Late Shri Madhur Bajaj was one of the promoters of Bajaj Finserv Limited. Pursuant to the Will dated 29th August, 2020 of Late Shri Madhur Bajaj, 5,00,000 Equity Shares held by Late Shri Madhur Bajaj in his personal capacity have been transferred to Smt Kumud Bajaj, in an off-market transaction on 13th June, 2025. 3.As per regulation 31A (6) of SEBI LODR Regulations, Late Shri Madhur Bajaj automatically ceased to be a promoter and his holdings are transmitted to the respective legal heir, i.e. Smt. Kumud Bajaj who would now be classified as Promoter. 4. Smt. Kumud Bajaj, wife of Late Shri Madhur Bajaj has now succeeded as Promoter and her holdings which earlier was shown under Promoter Group category has got transferred to Promoter Category.
